essential_assertions.text: assert forall|j: int| 1 <= j < a@.len() implies (#[trigger] a@[j]) == b@[2 * j - 1] by { assert(a@[j] == partial@[j - 1]); assert(partial@[j - 1] == b@[2 * (j - 1) + 1]); };

placeholders.original_text: assert forall|j: int| 1 <= j < a@.len() implies (#[trigger] a@[j]) == b@[2 * j - 1] by { assert(a@[j] == partial@[j - 1]); assert(partial@[j - 1] == b@[2 * (j - 1) + 1]); };
